error_signature: The item has no binary field ‘Bericht’ [item 0]
title: Missing binary field in Merge node
symptom: The workflow fails when trying to send an email with an attachment, displaying an error about a missing binary field.
applies_when: Attempting to send an email with an attachment
not_this_if: The email is sent without an attachment
The binary data is correctly passed through
root_cause: The Merge node is not configured to keep the necessary binary data from the previous nodes. If the output type is set to 'Keep Everything', it may pass through items that lack the required binary field, leading to the error.
fix_steps: Change the Merge node's Output Type to 'Keep Matches'.
Ensure that the binary field name matches the structure of the data being passed through.
agent_instruction: Adjust the Merge node settings to keep only matching items and ensure binary data is preserved.
